mapper.sql: id, version_id, core_field_key, core_object_type, disposition, reason, extension_field_key, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM domain_package_core_field_reuse WHERE version_id = #{versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY core_field_key ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package_core_field_reuse (id, version_id, core_field_key, core_object_type, disposition, reason, extension_field_key, created_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{coreFieldKey}, #{coreObjectType}, #{disposition, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{reason}, #{extensionFieldKey}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})

INSERT INTO domain_package_core_field_reuse (id, version_id, core_field_key, core_object_type, disposition, reason, extension_field_key, created_at) VALUES
(#{row.id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{row.versionId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{row.coreFieldKey}, #{row.coreObjectType}, #{row.disposition, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{row.reason}, #{row.extensionFieldKey}, #{row.createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
